name: Babovka/Also Called Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate egg whites from yolks. Set the whites aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Mix yolks with sugar. Gradually add oil, then hot water.
4. Combine flour and baking powder in a separate bowl.
5. Beat egg whites until they become foamy (about 3 to 4 times) using an electric mixer on high speed.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter by hand.
7. Add vanilla extract if desired.
8. Pour half of the batter into a greased round angel cake pan. Mix cocoa powder into the remaining half and pour it on top of the first layer in the pan without mixing together.
9. Bake for 45 minutes. Check doneness with a toothpick; it should not have any mixture on it when inserted into the cake.
10. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the finished cake.
11. Optionally, add raisins or nuts to the original batter or chocolate on top of the finished cake before serving.
